title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure could lead to significant data breaches, operational disruptions, and financial losses. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can gain access to sensitive systems and deploy malicious code at scale, potentially impacting multiple cloud environments.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing strict access controls, multi-factor authentication, and regular vulnerability assessments.
Monitor cloud environments for unusual activity, such as unauthorized changes to configurations or unexpected deployments, and ensure proper logging and alerting mechanisms are in place.
Develop and test a robust incident response plan specifically for ransomware attacks targeting cloud infrastructure, including regular backups stored offline or in immutable storage.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal risk, but widespread adoption could lead to potential misuse by malicious actors to identify unpatched vulnerabilities in systems. Additionally, reliance on the tool without proper validation may lead to false positives or negatives.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment before deploying it in production systems.
Ensure that the tool's results are cross-verified with other vulnerability management solutions.
Educate teams on the importance of manual validation of vulnerabilities and patches suggested by automated tools.

title: NICO-FTP 3.0.1.19 contains a structured exception handler buffer overflow vulnerability that...
description: NICO-FTP 3.0.1.19 contains a structured exception handler buffer overflow vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code by sending crafted FTP commands. Attackers can connect to the FTP service and send oversized data in response handlers to overwrite SEH pointers and redirect execution to injected shellcode.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25254.

title: Termite 3.4 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the User interface language settings...
description: Termite 3.4 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the User interface language settings field that allows local attackers to cause a denial of service by supplying an excessively long string. Attackers can paste a 2000-byte payload into the Settings User interface language field to crash the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25253.

title: 10-Strike LANState 8.8 contains a local buffer overflow vulnerability in structured exception...
description: 10-Strike LANState 8.8 contains a local buffer overflow vulnerability in structured exception handling that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by crafting malicious LSM map files. Attackers can create a specially formatted LSM file with a payload in the ObjCaption parameter that overflows the buffer, overwrites the SEH chain, and executes shellcode when the file is opened in the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25255.

title: FTP Voyager 16.2.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to...
description: FTP Voyager 16.2.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by injecting oversized buffer data into the site profile IP field. Attackers can create a malicious site profile containing 500 bytes of repeated characters and paste it into the IP field to trigger a buffer overflow that crashes the FTP Voyager process.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25252.

title: MyBB Last User's Threads in Profile Plugin 1.2 contains a persistent cross-site scripting...
description: MyBB Last User's Threads in Profile Plugin 1.2 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts by crafting thread subjects with script tags. Attackers can create threads with script payloads in the subject field that execute when users visit the attacker's profile page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The persistent cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the MyBB Last User's Threads in Profile Plugin 1.2 allows attackers to inject malicious scripts. This could lead to session hijacking, data theft, or the execution of unauthorized actions on behalf of affected users who visit an attacker's profile page.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the MyBB Last User's Threads in Profile Plugin to the latest version if a fix is available.
Implement input sanitization and output encoding to prevent malicious script injection in thread subject fields.
Regularly monitor user activity and profiles for signs of unusual behavior or malicious scripts.

title: MyBB My Arcade Plugin 1.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows...
description: MyBB My Arcade Plugin 1.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated users to inject malicious scripts through arcade game score comments. Attackers can add crafted HTML and JavaScript payloads in the comment field that execute when other users view or edit the comment.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25249.

title: Snes9K 0.0.9z contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Netplay Socket Port Number field...
description: Snes9K 0.0.9z contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Netplay Socket Port Number field that allows local attackers to trigger a structured exception handler (SEH) overwrite. Attackers can craft a malicious payload and paste it into the Socket Port Number field via the Netplay Options menu to achieve code execution through SEH chain exploitation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25251.

title: MyBB Downloads Plugin 2.0.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows...
description: MyBB Downloads Plugin 2.0.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows regular members to inject malicious scripts through the download title field. Attackers can submit a new download with HTML/JavaScript code in the title parameter, which executes when administrators validate the download in downloads.php.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute persistent cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, potentially compromising administrator accounts and enabling unauthorized access to sensitive data or system control.
recommended_actions: Update the MyBB Downloads Plugin to the latest patched version or apply a security patch that sanitizes user inputs in the download title field.
Implement web application firewall (WAF) rules to detect and block malicious payloads targeting the vulnerable parameter.
Educate administrators to avoid interacting with untrusted user-generated content until the vulnerability is resolved.

title: Microsoft 7 Tik 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows attackers to crash...
description: Microsoft 7 Tik 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows attackers to crash the application by submitting excessively long input strings to the search functionality. Attackers can paste a buffer of 7700 characters into the search bar to trigger an application crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25245.

title: Microsoft One Search 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local...
description: Microsoft One Search 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting excessively long input strings to the search functionality. Attackers can paste a buffer of 950 or more characters into the search bar to trigger an unhandled exception that crashes the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the Microsoft One Search application by exploiting an unhandled exception, leading to a denial of service. This could disrupt workflows and reduce productivity but does not compromise sensitive data or system integrity.
recommended_actions: Apply any available patches or updates from Microsoft that address CVE-2018-25242.
Implement input validation to restrict excessively long input strings in the search functionality.
Monitor application logs for signs of attempted exploitation and educate users on safe usage practices.

title: Microsoft FastTube 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers...
description: Microsoft FastTube 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting an excessively long string to the search functionality. Attackers can paste a buffer of 1900 characters into the search bar and trigger a crash when the search operation is executed.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The denial of service vulnerability in Microsoft FastTube 1.0.1.0 allows local attackers to crash the application, potentially disrupting workflows or causing inconvenience to users. This does not lead to data loss or unauthorized access but impacts application availability.
recommended_actions: Update Microsoft FastTube to the latest version if a patch is available.
Implement input validation to limit the length of strings submitted to the search functionality.
Monitor application logs for abnormal activity and crashes to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: Microsoft Eco Search 1.0.2.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local...
description: Microsoft Eco Search 1.0.2.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting an excessively long string to the search functionality. Attackers can paste a buffer of 950 or more characters into the search bar and trigger a crash by initiating a search operation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25244.

title: Microsoft VPN Browser+ 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows...
description: Microsoft VPN Browser+ 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to crash the application by submitting oversized input through the search functionality. Attackers can paste a large buffer of characters into the search bar to trigger an unhandled exception that terminates the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25241.

title: MyBB Like Plugin 3.0.0 contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to...
description: MyBB Like Plugin 3.0.0 contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts by creating posts or threads with unvalidated subject content. Attackers can craft post subjects containing script tags that execute when other users view the attacker's profile, where liked posts are displayed without sanitization.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute malicious scripts via cross-site scripting (XSS) by injecting code into post subjects. This can lead to session hijacking, data theft, or defacement of the application, potentially compromising user accounts and sensitive data.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of the MyBB Like Plugin if a patch is available, or apply any security fixes provided by the plugin maintainers.
Implement server-side input validation and output sanitization for all user-generated content, particularly post subjects and profile displays.
Enable Content Security Policy (CSP) headers to mitigate the impact of XSS attacks by restricting the execution of unauthorized scripts.

title: NETGATE Registry Cleaner build 16.0.205 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the...
description: NETGATE Registry Cleaner build 16.0.205 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the NGRegClnSrv service that allows local attackers to escalate privileges by exploiting the service binary path. Attackers can place a malicious executable in the unquoted path and trigger service restart or system reboot to execute code with LocalSystem privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20057.

title: sheed AntiVirus 2.3 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the ShavProt service that...
description: sheed AntiVirus 2.3 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the ShavProt service that allows local attackers to escalate privileges by exploiting the service binary path. Attackers can insert a malicious executable in the unquoted path and trigger service restart or system reboot to execute code with LocalSystem privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20061.

title: Microsoft VSCO 1.1.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to...
description: Microsoft VSCO 1.1.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting an excessively long string through the search functionality. Attackers can paste a buffer of 5000 characters into the search bar and navigate back to trigger an application crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the Microsoft VSCO 1.1.1.0 application by exploiting a denial of service flaw. This could disrupt operations for users relying on the application, but it does not appear to allow for privilege escalation or remote code execution.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of Microsoft VSCO if a patch is available that addresses CVE-2018-25238.
Implement input validation to limit the length of strings accepted by the search functionality.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity, such as repeated crashes, to identify potential abuse of this vulnerability.

title: Redaxo CMS 5.2 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows unauthenticated...
description: Redaxo CMS 5.2 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to create administrative user accounts by tricking authenticated administrators into visiting malicious pages. Attackers can craft HTML forms targeting the users endpoint with hidden fields containing admin credentials and account parameters to add new administrator accounts without user consent.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20053.

title: Microsoft Watchr 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers...
description: Microsoft Watchr 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting an excessively long string to the search functionality. Attackers can paste a buffer of 8145 characters into the search bar and trigger a search operation to cause the application to crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The denial of service vulnerability in Microsoft Watchr 1.1.0.0 allows local attackers to crash the application, potentially disrupting operations and causing temporary downtime. This vulnerability does not allow remote exploitation or data theft, limiting its overall impact.
recommended_actions: Update Microsoft Watchr to the latest version if a patch is available.
Implement input validation to restrict excessively long strings in the search functionality.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity and crashes to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: Microsoft Smart VPN 1.1.3.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local...
description: Microsoft Smart VPN 1.1.3.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting oversized input through the search interface. Attackers can paste a buffer of 2100 characters into the top right search bar to trigger an unhandled exception that crashes the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the Microsoft Smart VPN application, resulting in a denial of service. This could disrupt operations, especially in environments reliant on the application for secure communications. However, the impact is limited to local exploitation and does not directly compromise data or system integrity.
recommended_actions: Apply any available patches or updates from Microsoft to address CVE-2018-25239.
Restrict local access to systems running Microsoft Smart VPN to trusted users only.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity or repeated crashes, and implement input validation mechanisms where possible.

title: CVE-2016-20040 - TiEmu 3.03-nogdb+dfsg-3 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the ROM parameter handling that
description: TiEmu 3.03-nogdb+dfsg-3 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the ROM parameter handling that allows local attackers to crash the application or execute arbitrary code. Attackers can supply an oversized ROM parameter to the tiemu command-line interface to overflow the stack buffer and overwrite the instruction pointer with malicious addresses.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20040.

title: CVE-2016-20039 - Multi Emulator Super System 0.154-3.1 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the gamma paramete
description: Multi Emulator Super System 0.154-3.1 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the gamma parameter handling that allows local attackers to crash the application or execute arbitrary code. Attackers can supply an oversized gamma parameter value to overflow the stack buffer and overwrite the instruction pointer with a controlled address to achieve code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20039.

title: CVE-2016-20038 - yTree 1.94-1.1 contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows local attackers to e
description: yTree 1.94-1.1 contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by supplying an excessively long argument to the application. Attackers can craft a malicious command-line argument containing shellcode and a return address to overwrite the stack and execute code in the application context.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20038.

title: CVE-2016-20037 - xwpe 1.5.30a-2.1 and prior contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows local at
description: xwpe 1.5.30a-2.1 and prior contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by supplying overly long input strings that exceed buffer boundaries. Attackers can craft malicious command-line arguments with 262 bytes of junk data followed by shellcode to overwrite the instruction pointer and achieve code execution or denial of service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20037.

title: CVE-2026-4995 - A vulnerability was determined in wandb OpenUI up to 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unkno
description: A vulnerability was determined in wandb OpenUI up to 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file frontend/public/annotator/index.html of the component Window Message Event Handler. This manipulation causes cross site scripting. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4995.

title: CVE-2025-9497 - Use of Hard-coded Credentials vulnerability in Microchip Time Provider 4100 allows Malicious Manual
description: Use of Hard-coded Credentials vulnerability in Microchip Time Provider 4100 allows Malicious Manual Software Update.This issue affects Time Provider 4100: before 2.5.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2025-9497.

title: CVE-2026-4994 - A vulnerability was found in wandb OpenUI up to 1.0/3.5-turb. Affected is the function generic_excep
description: A vulnerability was found in wandb OpenUI up to 1.0/3.5-turb. Affected is the function generic_exception_handler of the file backend/openui/server.py of the component APIStatusError Handler. The manipulation of the argument key results in information exposure through error message. Access to the local network is required for this attack. The exploit has been made public and could be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4994.

title: CVE-2026-4993 - A vulnerability has been found in wandb OpenUI up to 0.0.0.0/1.0. This impacts an unknown function o
description: A vulnerability has been found in wandb OpenUI up to 0.0.0.0/1.0. This impacts an unknown function of the file backend/openui/config.py. The manipulation of the argument LITELLM_MASTER_KEY leads to hard-coded credentials. An attack has to be approached locally. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4993.

title: CVE-2026-2442 - The Page Builder: Pagelayer – Drag and Drop website builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Im
description: The Page Builder: Pagelayer – Drag and Drop website builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences ('CRLF Injection') in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.7. This is due to the contact form handler performing placeholder substitution on attacker-controlled form fields and then passing the resulting values into email headers without removing CR/LF characters. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary email headers (for example Bcc / Cc) and abuse form email delivery via the 'email' parameter granted they can target a contact form configured to use placeholders in mail template headers.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2442.

title:
CVE-2026-23399 - In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

nf_tables: nft_dynset: fix poss
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

nf_tables: nft_dynset: fix possible stateful expression memleak in error path

If cloning the second stateful expression in the element via GFP_ATOMIC
fails, then the first stateful expression remains in place without being
released.

   unreferenced object (percpu) 0x607b97e9cab8 (size 16):
     comm "softirq", pid 0, jiffies 4294931867
     hex dump (first 16 bytes on cpu 3):
       00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
     backtrace (crc 0):
       pcpu_alloc_noprof+0x453/0xd80
       nft_counter_clone+0x9c/0x190 [nf_tables]
       nft_expr_clone+0x8f/0x1b0 [nf_tables]
       nft_dynset_new+0x2cb/0x5f0 [nf_tables]
       nft_rhash_update+0x236/0x11c0 [nf_tables]
       nft_dynset_eval+0x11f/0x670 [nf_tables]
       nft_do_chain+0x253/0x1700 [nf_tables]
       nft_do_chain_ipv4+0x18d/0x270 [nf_tables]
       nf_hook_slow+0xaa/0x1e0
       ip_local_deliver+0x209/0x330

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23399.

title: CVE-2026-1307 - The Ninja Forms - The Contact Form Builder That Grows With You plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to
description: The Ninja Forms - The Contact Form Builder That Grows With You plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 3.14.1 via a callback function for the admin_enqueue_scripts action handler in blocks/bootstrap.php. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to gain access to an authorization token to view form submissions for arbitrary forms, which could potentially contain sensitive information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1307.

title: CVE-2025-15445 - The Restaurant Cafeteria WordPress theme through 0.4.6 exposes insecure admin-ajax actions without n
description: The Restaurant Cafeteria WordPress theme through 0.4.6 exposes insecure admin-ajax actions without nonce or capability checks, allowing any logged-in user, like subscriber, to perform privileged operations. An attacker can install and activate a  from a user-supplied URL, leading to arbitrary PHP code execution, and also import demo content that rewrites site configuration, including Restaurant Cafeteria WordPress theme through 0.4.6_mods, pages, menus, and front page settings.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-15445.

title: CVE-2025-12886 - The Oxygen Theme theme for WordPress is vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery in all versions up
description: The Oxygen Theme theme for WordPress is vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 6.0.8 via the laborator_calc_route AJAX action. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to make web requests to arbitrary locations originating from the web application and can be used to query and modify information from internal services.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-12886.

title: CVE-2026-4987 - The SureForms – Contact Form, Payment Form & Other Custom Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulne
description: The SureForms – Contact Form, Payment Form & Other Custom Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Payment Amount Bypass in all versions up to, and including, 2.5.2. This is due to the create_payment_intent() function performing a payment validation solely based on the value of a user-controlled parameter. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to bypass configured form payment-amount validation and create underpriced payment/subscription intents by setting form_id to 0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4987.

title: CVE-2026-1679 - The eswifi socket offload driver copies user-provided payloads into a fixed buffer without checking
description: The eswifi socket offload driver copies user-provided payloads into a fixed buffer without checking available space; oversized sends overflow `eswifi->buf`, corrupting kernel memory (CWE-120). Exploit requires local code that can call the socket send API; no remote attacker can reach it directly.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1679.
